prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone mirror selfie at night in a rainy neon city street, like an unposed everyday snapshot. A cute young East Asian woman stands close to a reflective dark storefront surface, centered from mid-thigh up, holding a silver triple-camera smartphone in front of the lower half of her face. She wears an oversized heather gray pullover hoodie with visible fabric texture, soft folds, drawstrings, a front kangaroo pocket, and roomy sleeves; one hand is tucked into the hoodie pocket. She has black medium-length hair with wispy bangs and loose tied-back strands, subtle eye makeup, pale pink manicured nails, and a plain black face mask. A black shoulder bag strap is visible on one side. The background is a Japanese entertainment district at night after rain, with wet pavement, strong neon reflections, streetlights, cars, pedestrians, bare winter trees, and tall signs; include one large red vertical sign on the left with Japanese restaurant text and glowing red characters, plus smaller distant signs and blue-red city lights. Use moody night lighting, realistic phone-camera grain, slight softness, natural perspective distortion, reflective glass, damp atmosphere, and authentic candid composition. Keep the outfit combination emphasized: oversized gray hoodie with casual streetwear styling; optionally show white platform sneakers only if the lower body is visible. No studio lighting, no glamour pose, no extra text overlays, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a realistic vertical smartphone mirror selfie at night in a rainy neon city street, like an unposed everyday snapshot. A cute young East Asian woman stands close to a reflective dark storefront surface, centered from mid-thigh up, holding a silver triple-camera smartphone in front of the lower half of her face. She wears an oversized heather gray pullover hoodie with visible fabric texture, soft folds, drawstrings, a front kangaroo pocket, and roomy sleeves; one hand is tucked into the hoodie pocket. She has black medium-length hair with wispy bangs and loose tied-back strands, subtle eye makeup, pale pink manicured nails, and a plain black face mask. A black shoulder bag strap is visible on one side. The background is a Japanese entertainment district at night after rain, with wet pavement, strong neon reflections, streetlights, cars, pedestrians, bare winter trees, and tall signs; include one large red vertical sign on the left with Japanese restaurant text and glowing red characters, plus smaller distant signs and blue-red city lights. Use moody night lighting, realistic phone-camera grain, slight softness, natural perspective distortion, reflective glass, damp atmosphere, and authentic candid composition. Keep the outfit combination emphasized: oversized gray hoodie with casual streetwear styling; optionally show white platform sneakers only if the lower body is visible. No studio lighting, no glamour pose, no extra text overlays, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的竖屏手机镜面自拍，场景设定在雨夜霓虹闪烁的城市街道，呈现出一种随意的日常抓拍感。一位可爱的东亚年轻女性站在反光的深色店面玻璃前，画面取景从大腿中部向上，她用一部银色三摄手机遮住下半张脸。她穿着一件超大号 浅灰色 套头连帽衫，面料纹理清晰，带有柔软的褶皱、抽绳、前置袋鼠兜以及宽松的袖子；一只手插在连帽衫口袋里。她留着 黑色中长发，配有空气刘海和松散的束发，化着淡雅的眼妆，涂着淡粉色美甲，戴着一个简约的 黑色 口罩。一侧可见黑色单肩包的肩带。背景是雨后夜晚的日本娱乐区，地面湿润，霓虹灯倒影强烈，街道上有路灯、车辆、行人、光秃秃的冬树和高耸的招牌；左侧包含一个巨大的红色竖式招牌，上面有日式餐厅文字和发光的红色字符，远处还有较小的招牌和蓝红相间的城市灯光。采用忧郁的夜间照明，呈现写实的手机拍摄噪点、轻微的柔焦感、自然的透视畸变、玻璃反光、潮湿的氛围以及真实的抓拍构图。重点突出服装搭配：超大号灰色连帽衫，搭配休闲街头风格；仅在下半身可见时，可选择性展示 白色厚底运动鞋。无摄影棚灯光，无摆拍姿势，无额外文字叠加，无水印。
